feedback: Refactoring well-executed. 57 tests pass, zero type errors, build succeeds. Main gap: some magic numbers still hardcoded in compute.ts and fractal defaults (256, 0.001). Critical: compute.ts uses raw 0.001 while constants.ts defines NEWTON_CONVERGENCE_THRESHOLD.
criticalIssues: compute.ts hardcodes 0.001 while NEWTON_CONVERGENCE_THRESHOLD exists in constants.ts
